comments.author: @Top7Daily-i9d
comments.text: Great video with stunning footage and a nice overview of Hawaii’s beauty! The scenery, beaches, and landscapes were amazing. One suggestion: it would be even better if there were a few more local tips, hidden gems, and estimated travel costs for each location. That would help travelers plan their trips more easily. Overall, very enjoyable and inspiring!
